name: io.github.theepicsaxguy/qdrant-codebase-mcp
title: Qdrant Codebase Indexing
description: Stop your agent re-exploring your repo. Index once into Qdrant, search semantically forever.

env.name: QDRANT_URL
env.description: Qdrant instance URL (http://localhost:6333 or Qdrant Cloud)

env.name: QDRANT_API_KEY
env.description: Qdrant API key — leave empty for local instances

env.name: ROOT_PATH
env.description: Absolute path to the repository root to index
